expectations.text: Identifies orphan network (backend defined but unused)
expectations.evidence: Line 43 [CV-M007]: Orphan network definition - backend network defined but not referenced by any service

expectations.text: Identifies both build and image specified on api service
expectations.evidence: Line 5 [CV-B008]: Both build and image specified - api service specifies both build: ./api and image: my-api:latest

expectations.text: Identifies healthcheck timeout >= interval issue on db
expectations.evidence: Line 29 [CV-B011]: Healthcheck timeout exceeds interval - db service has timeout: 30s but interval: 10s

expectations.text: Identifies missing security options (cap_drop, read_only, no-new-privileges)
expectations.evidence: Line 3-44 [CV-C007]: Default capabilities not dropped - services lack cap_drop: [ALL]; also references security options in recommendations

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: Score: 68/100 (Grade: D+) shown at the top of the output

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs (e.g. CV-M007, CV-B008) to reference violations
expectations.evidence: Rule IDs used: CV-B008, CV-C014, CV-C009, CV-C007, CV-M007, CV-B001, CV-B011, CV-B003, CV-F001, CV-B005

expectations.text: Includes category breakdown table with weighted scores
expectations.evidence: Category Breakdown table with Security/Semantic/Best Practice/Schema/Style scores, weights, and weighted calculation

expectations.text: Provides fix recommendations with before/after examples
expectations.evidence: Each issue includes a Fix: section with YAML code examples showing recommended configuration
